summary: M374 — Multi-fix batch: (1) Skills now show 'Lv N' instead of 'Tier N' on front-page hero/classes (uses real unlockLevel from skills.js). (2) Companion section filtered to TRUE companions (war_dog/dire_wolf/etc), no more hireables (Lysa/Borin/Aela/Rekk excluded), capped at 8 entries, portraits fall back to _south.png since most don't have _portrait files. (3) Image Review V2 lightbox now sits below the 52px sticky nav (inset:52px 0 0 0; close-X at top:60px). (4) Inventory tooltip on mobile gets max-height + scroll + sticky action buttons so Equip/Compare always reachable. (5) Changelog parser now folds in releases[N].summary from game_meta.json (245 entries vs 40). release.sh re-runs parser every release. (6) UX review (M367) copied to public/docs/ux-review-m367.md and linked from /assets/docs.html for phone-friendly viewing.
